title: B'Things
description: In this mod you will find a variety of animals and monsters, as well as weapons and equipment.
body:
[GECKOLIB IS REQUIRED](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

Ultra recommended use [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) or [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) for recipes



I'm learning how to mod in mcreator, bear with me. Constructive criticism is welcome.

(I'm Brazilian, sorry for any english mistakes)

B'things is a mod that adds a little of everything

# 

MOBS
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Emperor penguin
- Hipoppotamus
- Rat
- Clownfish
- Capybara

</details>

# 

ARMORS
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- White Album armor
- Capybara fur

</details>

# 

TOOLS
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Blacksmith God hammer
- Penguin beak tools
- Rat dagger

</details>

#

ENEMIES
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Baron's bones

</details>


# 

**ITS INCOMPATIBLE WITH OPTIFINE**

Feel free to use B'Things in your modpack
